data.content: Plan review approved. The proposed fix correctly targets the actual mismatch: history labels are currently built from session_start agent fields, while response entries do not carry response-level provider/model identity. The plan stays within scope by adding response-identity extraction in the history parser, centralizing metadata-first label selection with strict fallback to existing session fields, updating the session/response history surfaces to consume that source, and adding regression tests around OpenRouter-backed response metadata. No invariant conflicts were found. Implementation caveat: when deriving a single session-header label, use the same metadata-first precedence as response rows so the header cannot fall back to session-start Codex fields when response metadata provides the authoritative provider/model identity.
